title: Executions & History
description: Monitor, analyze, and optimize your agent execution performance

sections.title: Execution Management
sections.subtitle: Track and optimize agent performance
sections.description: Monitor all agent executions in real-time, analyze performance metrics, and optimize your automation workflows for maximum efficiency.

sections.title: Understanding Executions
sections.content:
Every time an agent runs, it creates an execution record that includes:

• **Execution Details**: Start time, duration, status, and results
• **Input & Output**: What data was processed and what was produced
• **Step-by-Step Logs**: Detailed trace of agent actions and decisions
• **Performance Metrics**: Response times, token usage, and resource consumption
• **Error Information**: Any issues encountered during execution

states.description: Execution is queued and waiting to start
Agent is actively processing the request
Execution encountered an error and stopped
Execution was manually stopped before completion

sections.title: Execution Metrics
items: **Duration**: Total time from start to completion
**Token Usage**: Input/output tokens consumed by AI models
**Function Calls**: Number of custom functions executed
**API Requests**: External API calls made during execution

sections.title: Success Metrics
items: **Average Duration**: Mean execution time across runs
**Error Frequency**: Common failure patterns and causes

sections.title: Execution Analysis
sections.content:
Use execution data to optimize your agents:

**Performance Optimization**
• Identify slow-running steps and bottlenecks
• Optimize function implementations
• Adjust model parameters for better efficiency

**Quality Improvement**
• Analyze successful vs failed executions
• Identify common error patterns
• Refine agent instructions and templates

**Cost Management**
• Monitor token usage and API costs
• Optimize for cost-effective operations
• Set execution limits and budgets

steps.title: Check Execution Status
steps.description: Look at the error message and failure point in the execution timeline

steps.title: Review Input Data
steps.description: Verify that input data is properly formatted and contains required fields

steps.title: Examine Function Logs
steps.description: Check logs for custom function executions that may have failed

steps.title: Validate API Keys
steps.description: Ensure agent has proper API keys configured for external services

steps.title: Test Simplified Version
steps.description: Run a simpler version of the execution to isolate the issue

sections.title: Best Practices
tips: 📊 **Regular Monitoring**: Check execution metrics regularly to identify issues early
🔍 **Log Analysis**: Review detailed logs to understand agent behavior patterns
⚡ **Performance Tracking**: Monitor duration and resource usage trends over time
🔄 **Iterative Testing**: Run multiple test executions when making agent changes
📋 **Documentation**: Keep notes on execution patterns and optimization decisions
🚨 **Alert Setup**: Configure notifications for failed executions or performance issues

solutions: Increase timeout settings in agent configuration
Break complex tasks into smaller steps
Optimize function performance and reduce API call latency
Review model response parameters for efficiency
Optimize prompts to be more concise
Use appropriate model sizes for the task complexity
Set token limits in agent configuration
Lower temperature settings for more deterministic outputs
Add validation steps to check result quality
Use execution templates for consistent workflows
